# backend/voice_ai/campaign_services.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:53Z

## Purpose
Campaign services · outbound voice AI flow with top 1% gates.

Per §76 (RAI 5-pillar · privacy + consent MANDATORY) + §82.21 (DLP) + §38.3
(audit row per outreach) + §82.7 (drift monitoring).

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import logging
- from `_` import re
- from `_` import uuid
- from `collections` import Counter
- from `typing` import Any, Optional
- from `_` import psycopg2
- from `_` import psycopg2.extras
- from `core.config` import get_settings
- from `schemas` import Customer, Product

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_conn()`: (no docstring)
- `_row(r)`: (no docstring)
- `_dlp_scan(script)`: §82.21 DLP · refuse scripts containing pii-shaped patterns.
- `_consent_gate(customer, require_consent)`: §76 + GDPR · consent_marketing must be true if require_consent set.
- `_segment_match(customer, target)`: (no docstring)
- `_render_script(template, customer, product, call_to_action)`: Variable substitution. Missing values render as empty (safer than crash).
- `list_campaigns(tenant_id)`: (no docstring)
- `get_campaign(campaign_id, tenant_id)`: (no docstring)
- `create_campaign(data, tenant_id)`: (no docstring)
- `update_campaign(campaign_id, patch, tenant_id)`: (no docstring)
- `execute_campaign(campaign_id, req, tenant_id, correlation_id)`: Iterate customers · apply gates · create campaign_run rows.
- `list_runs(campaign_id, tenant_id)`: (no docstring)
- `update_run(run_id, patch, tenant_id)`: Frontend reports outcome after browser TTS playback + optional STT capture.
- `campaign_metrics(campaign_id, tenant_id)`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
